provisions.content:
PROTECTIVE MEASURES AGAINST PESTS OF PLANTS
AND RELATED OFFICIAL CONTROLS AND
OFFICIAL ACTIVITIES

[ L.S.433.35

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 433.35
REGOLAMENTI DWAR PROTECTIVE MEASURES
AGAINST PESTS OF PLANTS AND RELATED
OFFICIAL CONTROLS AND OFFICIAL ACTIVITIES
16 ta’ Lulju, 2021

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 304 tal-2021, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 102 tal2023.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
